title: trigonella jemenensis
intro: Trigonella jemenensis, also known as Yemen fenugreek, is a plant species in the legume family that belongs to the same genus as fenugreek, but is a distinct and lesser-known species. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Trigonella jemenensis include its potential to help manage diabetes, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. Trigonella jemenensis can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or extract, and is often used in traditional medicine practices in the Middle East and North Africa.
